purpose: 20-step A/B gate for the MORI owner-compact needed hot-weight exchange path on the robust MBS8 standard-EP hot-helper surface.

hardware.post_run_rocm_smi: all 8 GPUs idle with 0% allocated VRAM

read.what_worked: The MORI needed-row exchange path is autograd-integrated enough to complete the full 8x MBS8 20-step training gate with finite loss/grad and no teardown leak.
read.what_failed: It is much slower and higher-memory than the retained selected-layout hot-helper baseline. This means the current needed-row exchange wrapper introduces overhead or loses an existing fast path; it does not remove enough selected-layout work to matter.
read.decision: Do not promote the needed-layout MORI exchange wrapper. Keep the robust hot-helper feature as the truth contract, but the next native MORI step must collapse the layout/collective ABI itself instead of wrapping the hot-weight exchange edge.

next_target.required_shape: saved hot/cold/helper owner-compact partition -> native compact normal/cold dispatch-combine -> helper owner-compact grouped MLP/VJP -> compact dX/dTopK return -> async hot dW reduce by owner slot
next_target.avoid: dense selected-order reconstruction, post-plan materialize adapters, and needed-row exchange wrappers that leave the rest of the standard-EP graph untouched
next_target.primus_turbo_position: bounded raw top-k/no-helper side probe only; not a replacement for the hot-helper mainline unless it gains a compact hot/cold/helper ABI

commands: env TARGET_HOST=do-vunguyen-mi350-gpu IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 GPUS_PER_NODE=8 CANARY_EP=8 CANARY_DP_SHARD=-1 CANARY_MBS=8 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_STEPS=20 ... CANARY_STANDARD_EP_HOT_SPLIT_WEIGHT_LAYOUT=needed CANARY_STANDARD_EP_NEEDED_WEIGHT_EXCHANGE_IMPL=mori CANARY_STANDARD_EP_NEEDED_WEIGHT_MAX_DENSITY=1.0 ... launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run
ssh do-vunguyen-mi350-gpu 'python3 - <<PY ... parse docker-run.log step metrics ... PY'
